headline: How The Cintas (CTAS) Investment Story Is Shifting With The UniFirst Deal And New Targets
summary: Cintas' fair value estimate is held at US$212.41 per share, even as some analysts have trimmed price targets by US$7 to US$32 and others flag US$215 to US$250 scenarios tied to the UniFirst acquisition. Those shifts reflect a split view, with some analysts focused on potential upside from UniFirst synergies and others emphasizing execution risk and the idea that much of the upside may already be priced in. As you read on, you will see how these moving targets shape the evolving Cintas story...
